1.content:
(a) Maggie gave birth to twins and named them after her siblings Bart and Lisa.
(b) Maggie is pregnant with twins and plans to name them after her siblings Bart and Lisa.
(c) Maggie gave birth to a girl and named her after her sister Lisa.
(d) Maggie gave birth to a boy and named him after her brother Bart.
1.title: A quick flashback over the past year

11.content: A few weeks later after her 20th birthday, Maggie gave birth to a son named Bart and a daughter named Lisa. Her and Milhouse decided to have their son and daughter meet their extended family at the wedding. Do they manage to keep their families from finding out about the birth or not?
11.title: (a)

112.content:
Maggie and Milhouse are pretending that their kids belong to a friend and they're just the babysitters. So they decided that during naptime they would work on the wedding. When all of a sudden Lisa stops by and they ask her to babysit their friend's son and daughter for a few minutes. How did Lisa figure out that the almost one year old boy and girl actually belong to her sister and Milhouse?

(a) she ran an in home DNA test on them.
(b) she knew the whole time that they were Milhouse's and Maggie's son and daughter, because the only people they knew that had the same exact names where Maggie's brother and sister. So she waited till they came in to see how Lisa was doing, and that's when Lisa confronted them.
(c) Lisa compared the baby boy and girl too pictures of her, her sister, her brother, and Milhouse when they were babies.
112.title: No

1121.content: When all of sudden just as Lisa is collecting DNA samples from the baby boy and girl that she already knows who they actually belong to, Milhouse and Maggie walk in and say what are you doing to our friend's kids. O you two are just in time to get your DNA test, they both gasp. What's wrong Milhouse and Maggie is it something I said or are you afraid that I'm going to find out right now that I have a niece named after me and a nephew named after our brother Bart. Alright Lisa you caught us these two babies are your niece Lisa Van Houten and your nephew Bart Van Houten. Now please don't tell anyone about it. Does Lisa tell someone and does that someone keep it a secret?
1121.title: (a)

12.content: Exactly nine months ago Milhouse got Maggie pregnant, and she's pregnant with twins and wants to name them after her siblings Bart and Lisa. They want to keep the pregnancy a secret, but do they.
12.title: (b)

choices: In the middle of the night after the wedding
122.content: One day while Bart and Lisa are visiting Maggie and Milhouse. Bart starts tickling Maggie the same way he did when she was a baby. When all of a sudden Bart says why did you kick me Maggie, I didn't kick you Bart. Maggie and Milhouse both gasp as they realize that the twins just kicked Bart. Hmm why did you two just gasp like that, it's almost like you two are trying to hide something from your family. Alright Bart I didn't kick you this time, because I'm pregnant with twins and it was the twins that kicked you. Ay caramba Lisa I'm an uncle and you're an aunt. So do you two have names for them yet, yes and we're naming them after you and Lisa. When all of a sudden Nelson says haw haw Milhouse still found a way to have a Lisa Van Houten in his family. Dang it Nelson's right Bart, um he is how Lisa. Um earth to Bart Maggie just named her daughter after me and is marrying Milhouse Van Houten. Ay caramba I feel stupid right now Lisa. When does Maggie give birth?
122.title: No

13.content: A few weeks later after her 20th birthday, Maggie gave birth to a daughter named Lisa. Her and Milhouse decided to have their daughter meet their extended family at the wedding. Do they manage to keep their families from finding out about the birth or not?
13.title: (c)

132.content:
Everyone could tell it was their daughter and their friends daughter, because she has blueish blonde hair and her hair looks exactly like Maggie's and Lisa's. So now that everyone knows about it. Who wants to play with Maggie's and Milhouse's daughter Lisa first?

(a) ironically Maggie's sister Lisa wants to play with baby Lisa.
(b) Milhouse's and Maggie's parents.
(c) Bart does but as he's playing with her he accidentally makes his sister Lisa upset.
132.title: No

1321.content:
Lisa asks Maggie and Milhouse if she can play with her niece Lisa, sure Lisa go ahead and you never know she might be gifted just like you and her mom. So Lisa grabs her niece and her saxophone, and goes to her niece's room. Which is covered in family pictures of just her aunt Lisa playing the saxophone. Wow I had no idea how much Maggie looked up to me as a role model.

When all of a sudden as Lisa is still amazed by how much Maggie loved her, she hears her saxophone being played almost like she or Maggie were playing it. So she looks down and her niece Lisa is playing her saxophone.

Hey Maggie and Milhouse looks like Lisa decided play her saxophone for her niece Lisa. Wait a second that doesn't quite sound like Lisa's playing style it kinda sounds like a combination of Lisa's playing style and my playing style. Ay caramba that's means Lisa's not playing it her niece Lisa is playing it.

Wow she really does take after her mom and aunt Lisa, I guess she does Bart. Hey lets go listen to Maggie's daughter Lisa playing her aunt's saxophone. O sorry you just missed it but you're just in time to watch me draw pictures. Ay caramba Bart could you stop saying that before our niece Lisa starts saying it. Ay caramba! I just drew a master piece, omg Maggie looks it her entire family. Well she obviously got the drawing and painting skills from Maggie, hold on a second whose El Lisa. Omg good Bart she practically copied you with the El Lisa, um I don't get Lisa and Maggie.

Bart you always tag all your spray paintings with El Barto. Ay caramba! Bart what did I just tell you about saying that catch phrase, um sorry Maggie I won't say it again. Wow so what you're saying is that she tags her spray paintings El Lisa. What else do they find out about Maggie's daughter Lisa?

(a) just how smart she really is when they see her changing her own diaper.
(b) just how smart she really is when she asks for someone to take her to go potty.
(c) just how smart she really is when she grabs the potty chair and pull ups from the closet and uses the potty in front of everyone.
1321.title: (a)

13211.content: So they all having fun while she draws pictures of them. She soon gets tired of drawing pictures and goes back to playing her aunt saxophone. She plays it for awhile until she keeps stopping to check her diaper. When all of a sudden she relieves her ______ into her diaper and decides to change herself?
13211.title: (a)

132111.content:
Everyone starts to notice her checking her own diaper. It started out every ten minutes she would stop to check her diaper. Then it was every five minutes she would stop to check her diaper. Then it was every minute she would stop to check her diaper. Now she stops every thirty seconds to check her diaper. When all of a sudden just as her thirty seconds are up and so she checks her diaper, and says out loud I'm peeing while she's peeing in her diaper. How soon does she change her wet diaper?

(a) she starts just as her stream of urine weakens down to just short squirts of urine.
(b) just as she lets one more squirt of urine hit the inside of her diaper.
(c) she opened it to early, because she thought she was done peeing and so she accidentally starts peeing some more with her diaper completely open. She automatically and quickly grabs a baby wipe to put on her crotch to keep her pee contained to her diaper.
132111.title: Bladder

132112.content:
Everyone starts to notice her checking her own diaper. It started out every ten minutes she would stop to check her diaper. Then it was every five minutes she would stop to check her diaper. Then it was every minute she would stop to check her diaper. Now she stops every thirty seconds to check her diaper. When all of a sudden just as her thirty seconds are up and so she checks her diaper, and says out loud pee-yew while she's pooping in her diaper. How soon does she change her wet diaper?

(a) she starts just after she pushed one more turd out
(b) just as she pushes one last turd out into the inside of her diaper.
(c) she opened it too early, because she didn't think that she had to pee until it was too late. So automatically and quickly put a baby wipe over her crotch to keep her pee contained to her diaper.
132112.title: Bowels

132113.content:
Everyone starts to notice her checking her own diaper. It started out every ten minutes she would stop to check her diaper. Then it was every five minutes she would stop to check her diaper. Then it was every minute she would stop to check her diaper. Now she stops every thirty seconds to check her diaper. When all of a sudden just as her thirty seconds are up and so she checks her diaper, and says out loud pee-yew and I'm peeing while she's peeing and pooping in her diaper. How soon does she change her wet diaper?

(a) she starts just as her stream of urine weakens down to just short squirts of urine and a few more turds leave her anus.
(b) just as she lets one more squirt of urine hit the inside of her diaper and one more turd leaves her anus and into her diaper.
(c) she opened it to early, because she thought she was done peeing and pooping and so she accidentally starts peeing some more with her diaper completely open. She automatically and quickly grabs a baby wipe to put on her crotch to keep her pee contained to her diaper.
132113.title: Bladder and bowels

13212.content:
Hey everyone look at the dance Maggie's and Milhouse's daughter is doing, omg Bart our niece has to go. When all of a sudden aunt Lisa is interrupted by her niece, when her niece asks her if she can take her niece to the bathroom to go potty on the toilet. Omg that's why she was dancing, yes Bart now if all you will excuse us my niece has a to use the toilet.

So Lisa and little Lisa enter the bathroom. Once inside Lisa remembers how she had to be whenever she took Maggie to go potty. So she quickly puts the potty training toilet seat cover in place, she then picks up little Lisa and sits her down on the toilet. So Lisa and little Lisa wait around and talk while little Lisa tries to go potty, and so after Lisa tells her niece a few jokes they both hear her peeing on the toilet. So they continue to talk as she continues to pee until all of a sudden. What happened?

(a) she starts to poop on the toilet.
(b) Lisa tells her to hold it, because now Lisa has to pee.
(c) someone knocks on the door.
13212.title: (b)

13213.content:
Lisa Van Houten you put your diaper back on right now, wait Maggie I want to see why your daughter removed her especially since its dry and clean. Hmm that could only mean one thing, um is it that she hates diapers and goes potty wherever she wants to go potty. No Bart it means she's way ahead of everyone else her age, and feels the need to self potty train.

Well we'll just have to see if you're right. Um why is she going into her closet, wait a second Milhouse didn't we put all my toddler stuff in our daughter Lisa's closet. Yes we did Maggie, then I bet she's looking for something of mine in her closet. Ay caramba I found them mommy, she said as she drags her mom's and aunt Lisa's old potty chair and pull ups. Wow I guess aunt Lisa was right Maggie about our daughter feeling that she needs to go potty and didn't want to go in her diaper. So everyone just watches her go potty like a big girl even though she's not even a year old. What did Maggie's daughter go on the potty?

(a) went pee.
(b)went poop.
(c) went pee and poop.
13213.title: (c)

132131.content:
So as she finishes going pee on the potty, everyone congratulates her. Once she's completely done she does what next. What does she automatically do next?

(a) uses a baby wipe to wipe herself.
(b) wait a little bit just to be sure that she only had to pee.
(c) wipe herself, put the pull up on and then ask someone to help her wash her hand in the sink
132131.title: (a)

132132.content:
So as she finishes going poop on the potty, everyone congratulates her. Once she's completely done she does what next. What does she automatically do next?

(a) uses a baby wipe to wipe herself.
(b) wait a little bit just to be sure that she only had to poop.
(c) wipe herself, put the pull up on and then ask someone to help her wash her hand in the sink
132132.title: (b)

132133.content:
So as she finishes going pee and poop on the potty, everyone congratulates her. Once she's completely done she does what next. What does she automatically do next?

(a) uses a baby wipe to wipe herself.
(b) wait a little bit just to be sure that she completely emptied her bladder and bowels.
(c) wipe herself, put the pull up on and then ask someone to help her wash her hand in the sink
132133.title: (c)

1323.content:
Bart takes his niece upstairs to her room. Once inside her room he realized that she takes more after the Simpson side than the Van Houten side of the family. Her room is filled with hand painted pictures of both sides of her family holding her. Ay caramba she must really have wanted to meet her extended family if she painted all these pictures that haven't even happened yet. So Bart starts talking to her and is shocked when she's actually talking to him like she's either 1.5 to 2 yrs old. Wow I'm having more fun with my niece Lisa than I ever did with my sister Lisa. When all of a sudden his niece says um uncle Bart I think you just upset someone, how Lisa when it's just me and you in your room. I know that Bart but I meant that you upset someone in the hallway. Omg Lisa who did I upset, well to me it seemed immediately after you compared how much fun you're having with me to how much fun you had with my aunt Lisa aka your little sister. Omg she must have heard me say it. So Bart goes to find his sister Lisa so he can apologize to her. What happens next and why was his sister Lisa upstairs in the first place?

(a) his sister Lisa came upstairs to use the bathroom because Homer was in the downstairs bathroom.
(b) she wanted to make sure he taking good care of their niece.
(c) their sister Maggie sent her to make sure was taking good care of her daughter.
1323.title: (c)

choices: Almost didn't find out before the wedding
14.content: A few weeks later after her 20th birthday, Maggie gave birth to a son named Bart. Her and Milhouse decided to have their son meet their extended family at the wedding. Do they manage to keep their families from finding out about the birth or not?
14.title: (d)

choices: No the boy's aunt Lisa figured it out
142.content: Everything was going perfect until one their son Bart accidentally started calling them mom and dad in front his extended family. Omg did the baby boy just call you two mom and dad. So Milhouse and Maggie quickly lied saying that he likes to play house where were his parents. Did the lie work or was someone able to figure it out?
142.title: Almost didn't find out before the wedding

choices: Maggie and Lisa's nephew Bart farted
Lisa's nephew Bart has a poopy diaper
1422.content: Maggie grabs baby Bart's neck and pretends to strangle him and says why you little do'h. When all of a sudden Lisa is standing right behind her, and says so this Bart doesn't remind you of your brother Bart and how Homer treated him. Ay caramba Maggie quit saying that I hear it enough from our brother, Lisa Maggie didn't say it this. Well then who did say it Bart if it's not Maggie, wait a second Lisa our brother isn't even here. I caught you red handed Maggie, ay caramba Lisa you used your nephew against me. I sure did Maggie and it totally worked. Pee-yew! Ok either someone has really bas gas or somebody needs a diaper change. Did either Maggie, lisa, or Lisa's nephew Bart pass gas or did Lisa's nephew Bart poop his diaper?
1422.title: No the boy's aunt Lisa figured it out

info.brief_description: This is a continuation of the story Milhouse dates Bart's sister
info.description: It's finally the day of Maggie's and Milhouse's wedding, which also Maggie's 21st birthday. Once again they're back in that same hotel but this time it's not just Bart and Lisa who stay with them in the VIP suite, in fact it's the entire Simpson family and Van Houten family. What happened in the past year, anything thing major with Milhouse and Maggie?
